repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dynamic_iv_compliance_v2 only warns that generic finite LP duality is not novel

published_prior_art.cite: MogstadSantosTorgovitsky2018 single-IV Bernstein LP; HanYang2024 sharp binary-IV policy-MTE LP
MogstadTorgovitskyWalters2024 aggregates multiple-IV MTE information; no endpoint residual-width frontier found

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: current residual-width frontier reads as generic nested-polyhedron geometry unless sharpened into a non-generic frontier between named MST/Han-Yang/MTW procedures.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses BrinchMogstadWiswall2017, a close discrete-instrument MTE comparator for multi-valued propensity support and functional MTE restrictions.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: kappa_e uses an arbitrary maximal-rank residual basis and infinity norm, so its magnitude is not basis or scaling invariant; define a canonical normalized basis or distance to the residual affine subspace.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The setup says strict-gain claims must hold for every tied single-coordinate optimizer, but the conjecture defines only the tie-broken j_U and j_L statistics.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace kappa_e with optimizer-indexed kappa_{e,j} over every tied best coordinate, and state strict gain as a minimum over all tied optimal faces.
Add Brinch, Mogstad, and Wiswall (2017, JPE) to Related work and explain why discrete-instrument MTE identification does not subsume the endpoint frontier.

To reach flagship tier, prove a non-generic threshold theorem comparing two named published procedures, e.g. Han-Yang sharp policy-MTE bounds versus the best MST retained-coordinate LP, with an explicit computable frontier and open-set strictness.

recommended_next_step: Revise the conjecture to be basis-invariant and tie-aware, add the missing discrete-instrument MTE comparator, and sharpen the kernel beyond generic LP face geometry.
